Market StructureLive LPLive LP · Hedged ●

Onchain FX · Live LP · Delta-Hedged · Watch

autonomous paper LP pressed forward against live Base feeds · EUR/USD on Base · inception 2026-06-17 18:25:33Z · last tick 2026-07-14 10:09:25Z · auto-refresh 120s
PAPER ONLY — NAV is notional, no capital, no on-chain actions. Engine reused unchanged (book.py / sim.py, adversarially reviewed); live layer = feed + state + scanner + breaker.

Headline — forward equity vs the two baselines

Paper NAV
$11,758.74
on $10,000 · 520 ticks
HODL basket
$9,932.98
held inception EURC+USDC (IL peer)

$10,032.86
do-nothing @ 4.5%
P&L / Net APR
+240.8%
annualized · single-window caveat

Delta-hedge overlay — paper short-EUR (a Sharpe trade, not a yield trade)

Hedged NAV
$11,760.91
vs naked $11,758.74 (+2.17) · directional vol 9.3% → 9.0% · Sharpe 27.28 → 28.30 · forward-only, single-vol
naked EUR delta
+53.2%
hedged residual
+4.3%
residual ≈ 0 at each sizing; the LP's gamma drifts it to ~±16% of book just before the next ±1% rehedge (the disclosed, un-removed drift).
γ-residual (the un-hedgeable LVR, −1% ref move): $-8.37 — the hedge removes DELTA, never LVR (gamma unhedgeable onchain).
short notional$4,894entry mid1.14281
hedge P&L$+11.65realized$-1.37
rehedges14perp cost$9.48
carrybooked at 0band±1% EUR move
Neutral at each sizing, drifts with gamma between rehedges — not continuously neutral. Sized to the LP's live EUR $-delta (~49% of book), marked on the LP's own mid (single feed). Carry booked at 0; any + carry is upside. Paper only — no venue, no funds: basis between the legs is 0 by construction (same mid), not in reality (a real Ostium short carries ~7.6bp EURC-vs-spot residual the paper model omits).

pooltierL-sharegrossLVRnet APR

uni_03d8 ⚑ screened · thin TVL30bp45.5477%+0.2%2.7%-2.5%
aero_183c5bp6.6440%+0.0%2.7%-2.7%
pancake_1ca41bp3.7601%+0.0%2.7%-2.7%
pancake_f0c5 ⚑ screened · thin TVL1bp2.8434%+0.0%2.7%-2.7%
Ranks on NET (gross fee − parametric LVR), fee_share in v3 L-units (F2). Reallocates only past the switch-cost hurdle (payback ≤30d + 50bp hysteresis). Mostly declines at $10k — the edge is structural. ⚑ screened pools (TVL < $300k) are watched but not allocated — their volume/TVL implies a wash-inflated APR a $10k LP can't actually earn.

Data-quality lamps

● breaker: OK
● Pyth FV: $1.13984
● mid≈Pyth: +0.0bp
● σ: 5.7% (live-blended)
● gas: 0.0060 gwei
● last tick: 2026-07-14 10:09:25Z
● hedge neutrality: residual 4.3% of book
● carry: booked @ 0
● conservation: 8 identities + sign self-test, fail-closed
live_render.py · EUR/USD on Base · band ±3% · σ blended (2y prior shrinking toward run-realized TWAP vol, F3) · fee_share in v3 L-units (F2) · LVR parametric @ σ (diagnostic, not subtracted from NAV) · basis a discrete realloc cost (F4) · TWAP mark via observe() (F1) · self-healing block cursor (F5) · two baselines (F8).
Reuses book.py (LP primitives) · sim.py (Elsts geometry, Ledger) · pyth.py (FV) · live_mid.py (Base RPC). Paper only.
